analysis.overall_assessment: The image shows a mix of healthy and unhealthy tea leaves, with an even distribution between the two types.

immediate_actions: Separate healthy leaves from unhealthy ones
Evaluate the extent of damage to each leaf type
processing_recommendations.sorting_strategy: Sort by visual inspection, separating leaves based on visible characteristics such as color and shape.
processing_recommendations.processing_method: Continue with standard processing for healthy leaves, while discarding unhealthy ones. If possible, adjust parameters to minimize further damage.
quality_preservation: Store remaining quality tea leaves in a cool, dry place

waste_prevention.salvageable_portions: Healthy leaves can still be used for processing. Unhealthy leaves may not be salvageable.
alternative_uses: Use unhealthy leaves as compost material
Experiment with different processing methods to salvage some value
waste_prevention.composting_guidelines: Compost unhealthy leaves separately from healthy ones, and monitor the decomposition process.
prevention_measures: Adjust processing parameters based on leaf condition
Train staff in proper handling techniques

economic_impact.estimated_loss_percentage: Approximately 10-20% loss of potential revenue due to unhealthy leaves
cost_saving_opportunities: Invest in better leaf inspection equipment
Train staff on proper handling techniques
value_recovery_methods: Use unhealthy leaves for composting or experimentation
Adjust processing parameters to salvage some value from damaged leaves

priority_actions: Separate healthy and unhealthy leaves immediately
Adjust processing parameters based on leaf condition
recommendations.timeline: Immediate actions to be taken within the next 24 hours, followed by regular monitoring over the next few weeks.
